svg.title: SmartBin hardware to dashboard data flow
svg.desc: Shows how sensor data travels from the ESP32 through MQTT to the Node.js backend and Vue dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What firmware does the ESP32 need for this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the inductive sensor connect to the ESP32?')
sendPrompt('How does the capacitive moisture sensor connect to the ESP32?')
sendPrompt('How do the three HC-SR04 fill-level sensors connect to the ESP32?')
sendPrompt('How does the ESP32 control the servo motors?')
sendPrompt('What MQTT topics does the ESP32 publish to?')
sendPrompt('Explain the smartbin/fill MQTT topic structure')
sendPrompt('What does server.js do when it receives an MQTT message?')
sendPrompt('What tables does MySQL store in the SmartBin database?')
sendPrompt('When does the backend send an SMS alert via Africa\'s Talking?')
sendPrompt('How does the Vue dashboard poll the backend API?')
